title: T1 row-invariant verify path: batched launch-census diff + clean C_B
method: rocprofv3 --kernel-trace windowed to mtp_verify_pass_* markers (verify-only), warmup-cycles 3 outside the resume window; clean C_B from persistent_device verify_seconds (no rocprof).

launch_census_diff.note: #98 measured chain_attn_mode=c1_loop (row-by-row). This measures chain_attn_mode=batched (the row-batched path). Launch count is per mtp_verify_pass.
launch_census_diff.finding: batched verify launch count is ROW-INVARIANT (931 at B=1 AND B=5, marginal 240->0) and at AR-parity (931 vs 920). residual_verify launches ~= residual_AR by construction -- T1's structural goal. The two +10/row families (router_logits_token_tile, awq_fusedw4_prefill) are kernel-VARIANT swaps (prefill-tile replacing c=1 at higher B); net launch count stays 931.

clean_cb.note: persistent_device verify_seconds/cycle, no rocprof. AR step from #98 = 10.65ms wall/tok (warmed).

b1.note: REJECTED: faster but exact_ar=False (diverges on final token), reproduced clean. Contradicts M12.1 'validated exact-AR' / M13.D 'graph=auto +3.9% slower'. Not adoptable; graph replay already rejected as the C_B lever (M13.D).

diagnosis.structural_goal: ACHIEVED & VERIFIED. The T1 row-invariant verify path = chain_attn_mode=batched. Launch census proves residual_verify (931) ~= residual_AR (920), marginal 240/row -> 0. exact_ar=TRUE at graph-off.
diagnosis.cb_target_not_met_by_T1: C_B=2.8 is NOT met by the row-invariant path alone. Correct-path (batched graph-off) C_B = 3.11 (B1) -> 4.52 (B5). The launch-count residual is collapsed, but verify WALL is bottlenecked by per-launch ctypes+HIP dispatch overhead (~40us/launch x 931 = host-gap-bound; busy is only 10.75-17.71ms).
diagnosis.cb_floor_is_busy: The task's 2.8 target = the busy-bound floor: verify busy at B=5 is 17.71ms (~ the assumed 18.5ms); (17.71 + proposer)/10.65 ~= 2.5-2.8. Reaching it requires CLOSING the ~26-30ms dispatch GAP, NOT more launch reduction.
diagnosis.binding_lever: M14.dispatch.1 (C-side per-MoE-layer dispatcher: one .hip translation unit with all launchers, one ctypes call/layer instead of 13). Per M13.C cProfile, ctypes marshaling + hipLaunchKernelGGL dispatch dominate (~6-8ms/pass recoverable). Graph replay (M12.1/M13.D) does NOT help -- ROCm 7.x hipGraphLaunch per-node overhead ~= direct dispatch at >900 launches.
diagnosis.no_merge_needed: AR (_run_layers_batch_decode rows=1) and verify (_launch_verify_chain_forward_accept rows=B+1) are separate functions but already row-batched and structurally equivalent (931~=920). A literal code-merge would not move C_B (the residual is dispatch overhead, not divergent structure), so it is effort without payoff.

forecast_seed_106.cb_busy_floor_estimate: ~2.5-2.8 (needs M14.dispatch.1 to close the dispatch gap)
forecast_seed_106.note: T1 launch residual = 0 (achieved). C_B binding constraint = per-launch dispatch overhead -> M14.dispatch.1, not launch count or graph replay.
